summary: Phase 2 features testing complete. All 3 new features working: 1) Referral commission tracking (20% recurring) - track-conversion endpoint handles recurring commissions, admin/commissions analytics returns proper data structure. 2) Invoice PDF generation + download - list/generate/download endpoints work, PDF downloads successfully. 3) WebSocket live events feed - connects, receives signal/trade/update events, displays in LiveEventsFeed panel with green status indicator, toast notifications appear for signals.
critical_code_review_comments: Referral commission tracking at /api/referrals/track-conversion correctly handles both first-time and recurring commissions
Admin commission analytics at /api/referrals/admin/commissions returns proper structure with recurring, first_time, total_commissions, pending_payouts
Invoice endpoints properly require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
Invoice PDF generation uses reportlab with dark theme branding
WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws/events sends connected event on connection, then random signal/trade/update events every 4-12 seconds
LiveEventsFeed.jsx has proper data-testid attributes: live-events-feed, ws-status, events-list, event-{i}
WebSocket reconnect logic works (5 second delay on disconnect)
Toast notifications appear for signal events via sonner
BillingPortalPage.jsx has InvoiceBtn component with download-invoice-btn-{txnId} data-testid
Payments table has Invoice column with Download button per row

success_rate.backend: 94% (17/18 tests passed - 1 minor endpoint path issue)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing payment_transactions for invoice testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features (iteration 67) all working: 1) Referral commission tracking - POST /api/referrals/track-conversion handles recurring commissions (creates referral_commissions record), GET /api/referrals/admin/commissions returns analytics. 2) Invoice generation - GET /api/invoices lists user invoices, POST /api/invoices/generate/{txn_id} creates invoice, GET /api/invoices/download/{invoice_id} returns PDF. 3) WebSocket events - /api/ws/events sends signal/trade/update events, LiveEventsFeed component displays with green status indicator, toast notifications for signals. Note: WebSocket has some initial connection failures but auto-reconnects successfully.

tests_executed.test: track-conversion returns tracked=False for non-existent referral
admin/commissions works with all time ranges (today, 7d, 30d, all)
WebSocket sends signal, trade, update event types
Referral config shows 20% bronze commission rate (regression)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Live Events Feed with data-testid
Frontend: WebSocket status indicator shows connected (green)
Frontend: Events list displays signal/trade/update events
Frontend: Toast notifications appear for signal events
Frontend: Billing page has Payments tab with payments table
Frontend: Invoice download buttons present in payments table

mocked_apis_list: WebSocket live events (demo data - random signals/trades generated every 4-12 seconds)
mocked_apis.note: WebSocket events are demo-generated as per main agent context
